Public Works Commission Agenda Report

To: Chair Merrick and Members of the Public Works Commission Prepared by: Robert DuBoux, Public Works Director/City Engineer Date prepared:   February 18, 2021 Meeting date: March 2, 2021 Subject: Capital Improvement Projects and Disaster Recovery Projects Status Report
RECOMMENDED ACTION: Receive and file report on the status of the City’s current and upcoming Capital Improvements Projects and Disaster Recovery Projects.

9a2cef45-70a6-44d2-a1f8-1b921627128b.text: The existing storm drain facility ends at the intersection of Clover Heights and Harvester Road.
